ai_summary: Aspinwall and Company Limited has filed an annual declaration under SEBI regulations, confirming that no shares were encumbered by its promoters or promoter group during the financial year ending March 31, 2026. This disclosure signifies financial stability and confidence among the company's key stakeholders, as the absence of pledged shares suggests no immediate liquidity concerns for the promoters. The document fulfills a routine regulatory compliance requirement and presents no red flags regarding promoter share encumbrance.
